best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-authentication-001 title: verify successful login process module: authentication source pages: 3 preconditions: user credentials are valid. test data: username: testuser, password: testpassword test steps: 1. enter the username and password. 2. click on the login button. 3. verify that the user is logged in successfully. 4. verify that the token is generated and stored. expected result: the user should be logged in successfully, and the token should be generated and stored.
